actions.disableAllSitesExceptSystem: Disable module on all sites except system
actions.enableAllSitesExceptSystem: Enable module on all sites except system

unresolvedReqs.alertMissing: {{count}} mandatory dependency/dependencies completely absent from this server — install the missing bundle(s) to resolve.
unresolvedReqs.alertConflict: {{count}} mandatory dependency/dependencies found on this server but cannot be wired — check for version conflicts or circular dependencies.
unresolvedReqs.bannerMissing: {{count}} missing mandatory dependency/dependencies — see 'Unresolved requirements' tab for details.
unresolvedReqs.bannerConflict: {{count}} wiring conflict(s) detected — see 'Unresolved requirements' tab for details.

filter.noResults: No requirements match the current filters.

status.conflictHint: A bundle providing this capability exists but cannot be wired — check for version mismatch or circular dependency.
status.missingHint: No bundle in this server exports a capability matching this requirement. Install the missing dependency.

confirm.message: Module downgrade is not officially supported. The module will be installed in stopped state — you can start it manually. Do you want to continue?
confirm.title: Confirm module downgrade

versions.hint: These are all versions of this bundle available in the module management store (/module-management/bundles) that are not currently installed.
versions.installError: An error occurred while installing the selected version
versions.installSuccess: Bundle version installed successfully via provisioning
versions.jcrHint: These versions are stored in JCR but not listed in the store catalogue.
versions.storeHint: Compatible store catalogue versions. Versions stored in JCR can be installed; others link to the store.

cleanup.jcrDescription: Removes old module versions from JCR, keeping only the current and one previous version per module
cleanup.success: JCR module versions cleaned up successfully
cleanup.error: An error occurred during JCR version cleanup

sync.long: Cluster state is not synchronized for this module/bundle

errors.loadingModuleData: An error occurred while loading module data
errors.loadingVanityUrl: An error occurred while loading data

importModule.error: An error occurred while reimporting module content
importModule.tooltip: Force reimport of the module's JCR content (import XML/ZIP files from META-INF)

input.autostartDesc: Automatically start modules after installation completes.
input.dryRunDesc: Simulate the update without applying any changes. The provisioning script will be shown for review.
input.onStartupDesc: Write the provisioning script to the patches folder so it runs on the next server restart instead of immediately.

presets.applyDesc: Live mode: updates are applied immediately. Previous versions are uninstalled.
presets.label: Quick presets:
presets.safeDesc: Preview mode: simulate updates without making any changes.

input.uninstallPreviousDesc: Remove the previously installed version of each module after the new version is successfully installed.

label.moduleAvailableVersion: A new version of the module is available: {{version}}

sam.errorStatus: An error occurred while loading the server status
sam.statusYellow: Some probes are not running, but the server is still functional

label.startBundleError: An error occurred while starting the bundle
label.stopBundleError: An error occurred while stopping the bundle
label.subtitle: Allows to install, update, and manage Jahia modules and if in cluster have an overview of the cluster state
label.synchronizeBundlesError: An error occurred while synchronizing bundles
label.pullBundlesError: An error occurred while pulling bundles
label.pushBundlesError: An error occurred while pushing bundles
label.title: Modules management
label.uninstallBundleError: An error occurred while uninstalling the bundle
label.updateAllDryRunTooltip: Dry run: simulates the update and shows the provisioning script — no changes will be applied.
label.updateAllLiveTooltip: Live mode: updates will be applied immediately to this server.
label.updateAllError: An error occurred while updating all modules
label.updateAllSuccess: All modules have been updated successfully

dialog.title: Dry run — Update preview
dialog.subtitle: {{count}} module(s) would be updated
dialog.curlHint: Replace <user>:<password> with your Jahia credentials before running.

dialog.title: Export module snapshot
dialog.hint: Only Jahia bundles (modules, system modules, template sets) are exported. Plain OSGi bundles are excluded.

embedAll.label: Embed all JAR files in the archive
embedAll.on: Self-contained archive — JARs resolved from local Maven cache and embedded. Works on any target system.
embedAll.off: Maven-only — bundles referenced by mvn: URL, no JARs embedded. Target must have Maven access.

error.generic: An unexpected error occurred during export

dialog.dropzone: Drag & drop a snapshot archive (.zip) here, or click to select
dialog.hint: Upload a .zip archive previously generated by 'Export snapshot'. All bundles in the archive will be deployed.

upload.deploySuccess: Module deployed successfully. The module list has been refreshed.

dialog.dropzone: Drag & drop a .jar file here, or click to select
dialog.hint: Only valid OSGi bundle JAR files are accepted (max 150 MB).
dialog.title: Deploy / Import module

error.generic: An unexpected error occurred during deployment

generateScript.title: Generate provisioning script
generateScript.subtitle: Select the modules to include. Only stable (non-SNAPSHOT) versions are available. Drop the generated YAML into any Jahia server's patches/provisioning folder to replay this module set.
generateScript.empty: No modules match the current filters.
